summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency mode sub-settings (Environment/Speech) are not saved and revert to defaults when switching between them.
description_clean: Transparency mode settings (Environment/Speech) are not properly applied or saved. When switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings for Transparency mode, the device reverts to a default (Surround 85 reverts to Speech, Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment) instead of saving the user's selection.
steps: Repeat with Free 60 and Free 20 sub-settings.
expected: The device should save and retain the user's selected sub-setting (Environment or Speech) for Transparency mode.
actual: When switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings, the device reverts to a default: Surround 85 reverts to Speech, Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment.
